data.title: Dow falls over 200 pts; 3M beats Q2 forecast with $6.3B sales, $2.16 EPS, raising 2025 guidance. Utilities shares up by 1.9%.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. took a hit midway through trading, with the Dow Jones index plummeting over 200 points on Friday. The Dow saw a 0.55% decline, closing at 44,240.83, while the NASDAQ also dropped by 0.11% to 20,863.57. The S&P 500 experienced a 0.14% decrease, ending the day at 6,288.48. In terms of sector performance, utility shares surged by 1.9%, but communication services stocks slipped by 0.9%. In other news, 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) reported strong second-quarter 2025 results, with GAAP sales hitting $6.3 billion, a 1.4% increase year over year. Adjusted sales were $6.2 billion, showing 1.5% organic growth and surpassing the estimated $6.09 billion. Adjusted earnings per share jumped by 12% year over year to $2.16, beating the projected $2.01. The company revised its 2025 Adjusted EPS to $7.75-$8.0, up from $7.60-$7.90, including the effects of tariffs. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Executives from leading crypto firms to attend US stablecoin bill signing post Thursday vote. Ripple, Chainlink Labs, Multicoin Capital, and Anchorage Digital to be present at the White House for GENIUS Act passage.
data.description: Executives from Ripple, Chainlink Labs, Multicoin Capital, and Anchorage Digital have announced their participation at the White House to commemorate the enactment of the GENIUS Act.

data.title: Black Dragon Capital sponsors 2025 Credit Unions for Kids Northwest Classic Golf Tournament, promoting children's health.
data.description: Black Dragon Capital℠ ("Black Dragon") has proudly announced its sponsorship of the For A Bright Future Foundation in partnership with Louis Hernandez Jr. This collaboration signifies a commitment to providing equal access to healthcare for communities globally. Based in Boca Raton, Florida, the foundation has a history of supporting this cause. The announcement was made on July 18, 2025, showcasing the dedication to making a positive impact.

data.title: nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) to release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 1, company website investors.nvent.com.
data.description: In London, nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT), a prominent company specializing in electrical connection and protection solutions worldwide, has announced that its second quarter financial results for 2025 will be disclosed on Friday, August 1, 2025. The financial information will be uploaded on the company’s official website at http://investors.nvent.com. An official news release will be provided by the company once the earnings data is made public, along with a direct link to access the documents. Additionally, nVent will conduct a conference call for analysts and investors in relation to the financial results.

data.title: Lowe's Foundation invests $43 million to address skilled trades labor shortage, supporting training programs for thousands.
data.description: A third group of recipients from community and technical colleges will receive grants to initiate and enhance training programs for numerous individuals aspiring to enter the trades field. The Lowe's Foundation revealed 12 new Gable Grants for this purpose. The grants aim to benefit thousands of aspiring tradespeople. This initiative was announced in Mooresville, North Carolina on July 18, 2025.

data.title: 73% rural healthcare orgs face HIPAA compliance issues due to staffing, funding gaps. Cyber threats challenging them.
data.description: In San Francisco, rural hospitals and clinics are struggling with increasing cyber threats, facing challenges such as tight budgets, limited staff, inadequate training, complex technology, and unsupportive vendors. They are trying to handle security tools without sufficient IT resources. A recent report reveals that rural healthcare organizations encounter more cybersecurity obstacles compared to urban counterparts across various aspects. This disparity underscores the growing need for enhanced cybersecurity measures in rural healthcare facilities.

data.title: Jewel Thais-Williams, creator of Catch One in L.A. in 1973, died at 86. Club was a haven for marginalized, celebrating 'Queer Black Joy'.
data.description: Established in 1973 in Los Angeles despite initial resistance from the local community, Catch One emerged as a prominent haven for a marginalized group. This venue provided a welcoming space for this often overlooked community.

data.title: Ethereum hits $3,575, BlackRock ETF invests $499M, GENIUS Act approved by Congress.ETH surpasses $3,350 resistance with 95% whale accumulation boost and regulatory victories fueling institutional adoption in July 2025.
data.description: In July 2025, Ethereum (ETH) achieved a significant milestone by surpassing the resistance level of $3,350. This breakthrough was accompanied by a remarkable 95% surge in whale accumulation, indicating a strong interest from large investors. Furthermore, the cryptocurrency received substantial regulatory approvals, leading to increased institutional adoption. These developments signify a positive trend for ETH's performance and market acceptance in the future.

data.title: BNB soars above $720: Maxwell upgrade boosts throughput, 1.59M BNB burned, zero-fee event until July 31 spurs adoption.
data.description: Binance Coin has surpassed the $720 resistance mark following the Maxwell upgrade, which has enhanced throughput capabilities. Additionally, a quarterly token burn eliminated 1.59 million BNB tokens. The zero-fee event has been extended until July 31, further boosting adoption rates.

data.title: Berks Homes introduces Elizabeth Village, a new townhome community in Lower Paxton Township, Harrisburg, PA.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on July 18, 2025, Berks Homes, a reputable builder with a 50-year history, unveiled the opening of Elizabeth Village. This townhome community is situated in Lower Paxton Township, Dauphin County. The development features carefully planned residential units and is centrally positioned within the township.

data.description: In Noida, India, CRC Group has recently introduced The PERIDONA, an ultra-luxurious residential project situated in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. This development promises a high-end living experience for residents seeking extravagance.

data.title: Ethiopia's construction industry set to grow by 9% in 2025 due to investments in transport and renewable energy projects.
data.description: A recent report on the construction market in Ethiopia indicates promising growth opportunities in various sectors. The construction industry in Ethiopia is projected to increase by 9% in real terms by the first half of 2025. This growth is fueled by substantial investments in transport infrastructure and renewable energy projects. Notably, in August 2024, the government allocated a record amount towards these initiatives. The report, titled "Ethiopia Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector," covers commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential segments. These developments suggest a positive outlook for the construction sector in Ethiopia, with significant potential for further expansion and investment opportunities.
